roles.name: Head Paleontologist
roles.description: Excavates the over-arching design — knows where every bone of the solution belongs.

roles.name: Head Chef
roles.description: Runs the kitchen pass — keeps every order moving and every plate on time.

roles.name: Apartment Manager
roles.description: Steward of the building — keys, layouts, permission sets and who gets in which apartment.

roles.name: Sandwich Architect
roles.description: Builds the Joey Special of Apex and LWC — never share my Apex.

roles.name: Transponster (Practice Lead USA)
roles.description: It's not even a word! Leads the New York Salesforce practice and keeps the standards high.

roles.name: Senior Buyer at Bloomingdale's
roles.description: Seasoned consultant — picks the right configuration off the rack every time.

roles.name: Junior Buyer at Bloomingdale's
roles.description: Up-and-coming consultant on the floor — running discovery and configuration under the senior buyer's eye.

roles.name: Coffee Shop Architect
roles.description: Designs the espresso lines that connect every system — Central Perk's master plumber.

roles.name: Espresso Engineer
roles.description: Pulls the integration shots — APIs, middleware, events, all to spec.

roles.name: Barista in Training
roles.description: Learning the integration craft — webhooks, batch jobs, and the foam art of error handling.

roles.name: Quality Inspector at Mattress King
roles.description: Tests every spring before a customer sleeps on it — finds the lumps before go-live.

roles.name: Head of Marketing at Ralph Lauren
roles.description: Sets the brand voice — runs the marketing floor with poise and a tasteful scarf.

roles.name: Senior Stylist at Bloomingdale's
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — pulls the right looks together season after season.

roles.name: Vogue Assistant
roles.description: Carries the campaigns into the field — content, creative, and the daily grind on Sixth Avenue.

roles.name: Data Processor at Chandler's Office
roles.description: WENUS reports and weekly estimated net usage statistics — translates the business into the build.

roles.name: Senior Sandwich Architect
roles.description: Oldest hand at the deli counter — owns the gnarliest Apex and the trickiest LWC.

roles.name: Smelly Cat Intern
roles.description: Brand new on the scene — learning the chords of admin and config one off-key strum at a time.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

Pivot the Couch Up the Stairs

realms.projectName: Central Perk — Coffee House Operations Platform

core-six.themedRole: Head of Marketing at Ralph Lauren

dating-pool.themedRole: Head of Marketing at Ralph Lauren

core-six.name: Keys to Apartment 20
core-six.description: Discovery sign-off — keys handed over and the orange couch is in place.

core-six.name: Pivot the Couch
core-six.description: Build kickoff: PIVOT! PIVOT! — the couch (and the architecture) finally goes up the stairs.

core-six.name: The One With the Apartment Quiz
core-six.description: Mid-project gate: who knows the system best — losers move out.

core-six.name: Trifle Tasting (with Beef)
core-six.description: UAT pass: Rachel's trifle. Tastes like feet. Logged as a known issue.

core-six.name: We Were on a Break Sign-off
core-six.description: Phase invoice trigger: contract clarified, no more ambiguity.

core-six.name: The Last One
core-six.description: Go-Live: keys returned, lights off, coffee one last time at Central Perk.

central-perk-staff.name: Open the Doors
central-perk-staff.description: Project kickoff: Gunther flips the sign to OPEN.

central-perk-staff.name: Smelly Cat Soundcheck
central-perk-staff.description: Build phase: open mic stage stood up, Phoebe approves the levels.

central-perk-staff.name: Saturday Brunch Rush
central-perk-staff.description: UAT gate: the espresso line holds through the brunch rush.

central-perk-staff.name: New Espresso Machine Online
central-perk-staff.description: Go-Live: La Marzocco fully provisioned and pulling shots.

central-perk-staff.name: Tip Jar Reconciliation
central-perk-staff.description: Final invoice: end-of-shift tip jar counted and split.

central-perk-staff.name: Closing Time
central-perk-staff.description: Hyper-care close: chairs up, mop out, Gunther locks up.

geller-bing-family.name: Save Date for Thanksgiving
geller-bing-family.description: Discovery: invitations modelled, RSVPs flowing in.

geller-bing-family.name: Geller Cup Kickoff
geller-bing-family.description: Build: the football is dusted off and the Geller Cup is on the line.

geller-bing-family.name: The One Where Monica Cooks
geller-bing-family.description: Mid-project gate: Monica takes the kitchen — no one else gets in.

geller-bing-family.name: Carving the Turkey
geller-bing-family.description: Go-Live: Joey eats an entire turkey, the family is fed.

geller-bing-family.name: Photo Album on the Coffee Table
geller-bing-family.description: Hyper-care close: photos digitised and back on the shelf.

geller-bing-family.name: Final Holiday Invoice
geller-bing-family.description: Final invoice from the Geller-Bing household.

dating-pool.name: First Coffee at Central Perk
dating-pool.description: Kickoff: meet-cute logged in the CRM, opportunity opened.

dating-pool.name: Meeting the Friends
dating-pool.description: Discovery: stakeholder review with the Core Six.

dating-pool.name: Anniversary Dinner Sign-off
dating-pool.description: UAT acceptance: candlelight, soft music, all acceptance criteria met.

dating-pool.name: Move-in or Break-up
dating-pool.description: Go-Live: the relationship is upgraded to production (or rolled back).

dating-pool.name: Final Settlement
dating-pool.description: Final invoice: who keeps the chick and the duck.

Ross Geller.notes: Museum dig in Beijing — pre-arranged research trip.

Monica Geller.notes: Catering an iron chef tasting — 11 on the cleanliness scale.

Chandler Bing.notes: Tulsa office reassignment — could this BE any more inconvenient?

Joey Tribbiani.notes: Days of Our Lives shoot — Dr. Drake Ramoray returns.

Phoebe Buffay.notes: Smelly Cat recording session at the studio.

Mike Hannigan.notes: Piano gig at the hotel bar — extended residency.

Jack Geller.notes: Long Island garage cleanout — annual tradition.

Nora Bing.notes: Book tour — new romance novel launch.

Frank Buffay Jr..notes: Triplets' birthday week — Frank Jr. Jr., Leslie, and Chandler.
